title: Update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.45.2
body:

comments.body: @giuseppe (cc: @rhatdan ) something in c/storage between 1.45.1 and 1.45.2, probably #1471 , is breaking c/image and Skopeo CI, at least in the admittedly pretty unusual setup of Skopeo’s CI.

> @giuseppe (cc: @rhatdan ) something in c/storage between 1.45.1 and 1.45.2, probably #1471 , is breaking c/image and Skopeo CI, at least in the admittedly pretty unusual setup of Skopeo’s CI.

That's because 1.45.2 was cut from main and not from the release-1.45 branch. @rhatdan can you cut a 1.45.3 but from the correct branch?

> That's because 1.45.2 was cut from main and not from the release-1.45 branch. @rhatdan can you cut a 1.45.3 but from the correct branch?

prepared a PR here: https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1477

### Renovate Ignore Notification

As this PR has been closed unmerged, Renovate will now ignore this update (v1.45.2). You will still receive a PR once a newer version is released, so if you wish to permanently ignore this dependency, please add it to the `ignoreDeps` array of your renovate config.

If this PR was closed by mistake or you changed your mind, you can simply rename this PR and you will soon get a fresh replacement PR opened.

> That's because 1.45.2 was cut from main and not from the release-1.45 branch

v1.45.2 and v1.45.3 are identical except for the version number, so I don’t think that explains the failures.
Confirming: #1866 updating to 1.45.3 sees the same failures.
